title: AIS Governance Activity Registry
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for governance-registry.yaml. Each entry defines one governed agent activity including its autonomy level, risk, tools, approval requirements, and evidence requirements. Reference: framework.md section 9.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this governance entry (e.g., 'architecture-review-requirements').

agent.description: The agent responsible for this activity (e.g., 'architecture-agent'). Must match an entry in agent-catalog.yaml.

step.description: The AIS Specify SDLC step this activity belongs to.

activity.description: Human-readable name of the specific activity being governed.

summary.description: Brief description of what the agent does in this activity.

max_autonomy.description: Maximum autonomy level permitted for this activity. L0=Observe; L1=Recommend; L2=Prepare; L3=Execute.

current_autonomy.description: Currently active autonomy level. May be lower than max_autonomy.

allowed_tools.description: Explicit list of tools the agent is permitted to invoke for this activity.

prohibited_actions.description: Actions the agent must never perform in this activity, regardless of confidence.

required_inputs.description: Artifact types or named artifacts that must exist before this activity can begin.

required_evidence.description: Evidence artifacts that must be produced and stored before the activity is considered complete.

approval_requirements.description: Named approval checks that must pass before this activity's outputs are authoritative.

approver_role.description: Role or GitHub team that must approve (e.g., 'solution-architect', 'security-team').

required.description: If true, this approval is mandatory and cannot be bypassed.

timeout_hours.description: How many hours to wait for approval before escalating. Null means no timeout.

confidence_threshold.description: Per-activity confidence thresholds. Override the global governance defaults.

recommend.description: Minimum confidence to produce a recommendation.

prepare.description: Minimum confidence to prepare a draft artifact.

execute.description: Minimum confidence to execute an L3 action.

policy_source.description: Path or reference to the policy, standard, or approved artifact that authorizes this activity.

status.description: Governance approval status for this entry.

completeness_pct.description: Percentage of required fields and evidence that have been configured.

approved_by.description: GitHub username who approved this entry. Null if not yet approved.

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this entry was approved.

last_assessed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last review assessment.

review_interval_days.description: How frequently this entry must be reviewed (days). Overrides global default.

review_due_at.description: ISO-8601 date when the next review is due.

review_state.description: Current review state, updated by governance reassessment workflow.

review_date.description: Alias for review_due_at. Prefer review_due_at for new entries.

owner.description: GitHub username or team responsible for maintaining this governance entry.

notes.description: Free-form notes about this activity, outstanding assumptions, or open questions.
